BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because external scripts/styles are loaded.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Vulnerability exists in public-facing code — no auth required.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: Victim must visit the vulnerable page or interact with it.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: External scripts can access other browser resources (DOM, cookies, etc.).

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Cookies, tokens, and session data could be exposed.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Page content and behavior can be manipulated via malicious scripts.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: May degrade usability or cause session hijacks, but doesn't crash systems.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: User must access the page or perform a click.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: External code can affect browser scope and beyond.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Attacker can alter UI behavior or logic.
